title: Hivecraft: An Alternia Addon for Minestuck
description: Alternia from Homestuck added to Minecraft!
body:
This mod's primary (and only!) focus is to add Alternia, home planet of the Trolls from Homestuck to Minecraft. It includes a new dimension with a handful of varied biomes, a full suite of new building blocks, ways to farm foods which could previously only be found in chests in frog temples or alchemized, and a few new mobs! Not only that, but alternia has everything you need in order to enter the medium, including frog temples, cruxite, naturally generating quartz, etc

Tysm for 413 downloads!

Oracle Canopy -
The Oracle Canopy is a cold forest inhabited by tall blue trees. Homestuck fans will recognize this biome as where Terezi's hive was built.

Bramble Forest -
The Bramble Forest is a dark forest of dry, sharp trees. The wood in this biome is required to craft Bug Nests, and this biome is also home to Cat Lusi! Cat Lusi are very friendly beasts who can be rode like horses without the need for a saddle, and they can be tamed by feeding them meat from grubs, which Cat Lusi prefer cooked.

Rocky Plains & Rocky Plateau -
These biomes, which are modeled after the area where Vriska and Equius's hives were built, are home to Spider Lusi. These large spiders can be tamed and kept as a guardian, however, it's not recommended to tame more than one, as they tend to be extremely territorial towards each other and other lusi.

Recuperacoons -
To set your spawn point on Alternia, you can build a recuperacoon out of grubs and sopor slime. Right clicking on the core of the recuperacoon while in sopor slime will set your spawn. 

Cobalt -
Cobalt is a metal that can be used to upgrade diamond gear as an alternative to Netherite. The stats are identical to Netherite, but a smithing template is not required. Instead, the cobalt gear takes 2 ingots to make instead of one. If you have netherite, you can still upgrade cobalt gear into netherite for mod compatability.

The Unmatched Power of the Sun - 
Looking up at Alternia's sun can cause damage to your vision. Either stay indoors during the day, or keep your head low! If you do get blinded by the sun, you can use salt, zinc, and water to craft Eye Drops that will heal your vision.

Bug Nests -
Bug nests can be crafted with Bramble Wood and dirt, and can be baited with either rotten flesh or specially prepared insect food, which will each attract different insects as a reliable source of food.

Grubs and Grub Nests -
Grub nests can be found around alternia's forests, and when broken will drop a few grubs. These can be placed on the ground and picked back up, but putting insect food into a grub nest will allow it to eventually spawn another grub.

Hemospectrum Dyes -
Flowers can be found in various biomes of alternia, and can be crafted into 12 new dyes matching the colors of the hemospectrum. These can be used to color hiveglass and lusus wool blocks. These dyes can also be obtained from Troll Blood dropped by Shadow Droppers.

Some notes -
This was made with Mcreator, and this is my first attempt at making something of this scale, so please be constructive with your comments and report any bugs you find.
some textures in this mod are edited vanilla, create, and minestuck textures for the sake of consistency.
This mod was previously uploaded to Curseforge. The Curseforge version will not be recieving updates.

[REQUIRES MINESTUCK](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minestuck)
